The user inflicts {uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of bleeding, {uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of burning, and {uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of toxin on targets in the area of effect.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g} (+{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}), {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горение{/g} (+{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}) и {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} (+{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}) на цели в {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}области действия{/g}.
Обладатель аугмента снимает с себя кровотечение (кровопотеря не снимается), горение (варп-ожог и ожог души не снимаются) и отравление, но получает {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

languages.text:
El usuario inflige +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} y +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} a los objetivos situados en el {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}área de efecto{/g}.
El usuario elimina los efectos de sangrado (pero no hemorragia), quemadura (pero no la de disformidad ni la del alma) y toxina, pero a cambio sufre {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g}.

The user removes bleeding (haemorrhage is not removed), burning (warp burn and soul burn are not removed), and toxin, but suffers {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

El usuario elimina los efectos de sangrado (pero no hemorragia), quemadura (pero no la de disformidad ni la del alma) y toxina, pero a cambio sufre {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g}.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer belegt Ziele im {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}Wirkungsbereich{/g} mit +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} und +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g}.
Der Nutzer entfernt Bluten (mit Ausnahme von Blutung), Verbrennen (mit Ausnahme von Warp- und Seelen-Brand), und Gift, erleidet aber {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g}.

Der Nutzer entfernt Bluten (mit Ausnahme von Blutung), Verbrennen (mit Ausnahme von Warp- und Seelen-Brand), und Gift, erleidet aber {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g}.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}etki alanı{/g} içindeki hedeflerde +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanama{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} ve +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} oluşturur.
Kullanıcı; kanama (nezif ortadan kaldırılmaz), yanma (öte yanığı ve ruh yanığı ortadan kaldırılmaz) ve toksin etkilerini ortadan kaldırır ancak {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasara{/g} maruz kalır.
languages.original_text:
The user inflicts +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, and +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} on targets in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g}.
The user removes bleeding (haemorrhage is not removed), burning (warp burn and soul burn are not removed), and toxin, but suffers {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}etki alanı{/g} içindeki hedeflerde +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanama{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} ve +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} oluşturur.
Kullanıcı; kanama (nezif ortadan kaldırılmaz), yanma (öte yanığı ve ruh yanığı ortadan kaldırılmaz) ve toksin etkilerini ortadan kaldırır ancak {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasara{/g} maruz kalır.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur inflige +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} et +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} aux cibles se trouvant dans la {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}zone d'effet{/g}.
Il dissipe les effets de Saignement (hors Hémorragie), de Combustion (hors Combustion Warp et Brûlure de l'âme) et de Toxine qui l'affectent, mais subit {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user inflicts +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, and +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} on targets in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g}.
The user removes bleeding (haemorrhage is not removed), burning (warp burn and soul burn are not removed), and toxin, but suffers {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur inflige +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} et +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} aux cibles se trouvant dans la {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}zone d'effet{/g}.
Il dissipe les effets de Saignement (hors Hémorragie), de Combustion (hors Combustion Warp et Brûlure de l'âme) et de Toxine qui l'affectent, mais subit {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g}.

languages.text:
使用者对{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}效果区域{/g}内的目标施加{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}层的{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}、{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}层的{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}，以及{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}层的{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}。
使用者移除流血（不包括放血）、燃烧（不包括亚空间烧灼和灵魂燃烧）和毒素，但承受{uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text:
The user inflicts +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, and +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} on targets in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g}.
The user removes bleeding (haemorrhage is not removed), burning (warp burn and soul burn are not removed), and toxin, but suffers {uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用者对{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}效果区域{/g}内的目标施加{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}层的{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}、{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}层的{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}，以及{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}层的{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}。
使用者移除流血（不包括放血）、燃烧（不包括亚空间烧灼和灵魂燃烧）和毒素，但承受{uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。

languages.text:
使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}効果範囲{/g}内の対象に、{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}を+{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}レベル、{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}を+{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}レベル、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}を+{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}レベル付与する。
使用者は出血（大出血は除去されない）、燃焼（ワープ燃焼および魂の燃焼は除去されない）、毒を除去するが、{uip|Damage|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a}の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を受ける。
languages.original_text:
The user inflicts +{uip|Bleeding|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g}, +{uip|Burning|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}, and +{uip|Toxin|627dbcb27be64dc68101d57cdea9b15a} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} on targets in the {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area of effect{/g}.
